memberdef.argsstring: (XUfsPsxc_Xfer_CmdDesc *CmdDescPtr, u8 TransType, u32 Upiu_Dw0, u8 QueryTaskMangFn, u16 DataSegmentLen)
memberdef.name: XUfsPsxc_FillUpiuHeader

memberdef.argsstring: (const XUfsPsxc *InstancePtr, XUfsPsxc_Xfer_CmdDesc *CmdDescPtr, u32 BlkCnt, u8 Cmd, u64 Address)
memberdef.name: XUfsPsxc_FillCmdUpiu

memberdef.argsstring: (XUfsPsxc_Xfer_CmdDesc *CmdDescPtr, u8 Cmd, u32 Tsf_Dw0, u32 Value, u16 Length)
memberdef.name: XUfsPsxc_FillQryReqUpiu

memberdef.argsstring: (XUfsPsxc *InstancePtr, const XUfsPsxc_Xfer_CmdDesc *CmdDescPtr, u32 DataDirection, u32 RespUpiuLen, u32 PrdtLen)
memberdef.name: XUfsPsxc_FillUTPTransReqDesc

memberdef.argsstring: (XUfsPsxc_UicCmd *UicCmdPtr, u32 MIBAttr_GenSel, u32 MIBVal, u32 AttrSetType, u32 Cmd)
memberdef.name: XUfsPsxc_FillUICCmd

briefdescription.para: Looks up the device configuration based on the unique device ID.

detaileddescription.para: A table contains the configuration info for each device in the system.

parameterdescription.para: contains the BaseAddress of the device to look up the configuration for.

simplesect.para: A pointer to the configuration found or NULL if the specified device ID was not found. See XUfsPsxc.h for the definition of XUfsPsxc_Config.

briefdescription.para: Initializes a specific XUfsPsxc instance such that the driver is ready to use.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XUfsPsxc instance.
is a reference to a structure containing information about a specific UFSPSXC device. This function initializes an InstancePtr object for a specific device specified by the contents of Config.

briefdescription.para: Initializes the Host Controller and UFS device.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XUfsPsxc instance.

simplesect.para: XUFSPSXC_SUCCESS, XUFSPSXC_FAILURE, UIC Error Codes in xufspsxc.h file.

memberdef.argsstring: (XUfsPsxc *InstancePtr, u32 Lun, u64 Address, u32 BlkCnt, const u8 *Buff)
memberdef.name: XUfsPsxc_ReadPolled

briefdescription.para: This API perform the data read from the UFS device.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XUfsPsxc instance.
is the starting Logical Unit number.
is the number of blocks to be read.
is a pointer to the destination data buffer.

memberdef.argsstring: (XUfsPsxc *InstancePtr, u32 Lun, u64 Address, u32 BlkCnt, const u8 *Buff)
memberdef.name: XUfsPsxc_WritePolled

briefdescription.para: This API perform the data Write to the UFS device.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XUfsPsxc instance.
is the starting Logical Unit number.
is the number of blocks to be read.
is a pointer to the destination data buffer.

briefdescription.para: This API check boot requirements like BootEnable and bBootLunEn.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XUfsPsxc instance.

briefdescription.para: This API Configures the Power Mode.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XUfsPsxc instance.
is the Power Mode value to be set. Refer XUFSPSXC_PWM_* XUFSPSXC_HS_* macros in xufspsxc.h file.

briefdescription.para: This API switch the Boot-LU(1->2 or 2->1) by modifying the Attributes and also set the block size to 4K if it is not 4K.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XUfsPsxc instance.
